modules.sql: SELECT cp.customer_id, COALESCE(c.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(c.last_name, '') AS last_name, MIN(cp.as_of) AS as_of FROM customer_preferences cp INNER JOIN customers c ON c.id = cp.customer_id AND c.as_of = cp.as_of WHERE strftime('%w', cp.as_of) != '0' GROUP BY cp.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 AND COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN cp.opted_in = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ORDER BY cp.customer_id
